responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete all IVX FINAL BLOCKER CLOSURE items and FINAL CLOSURE tasks: remove all Rork dependencies, reconcile video counts, fix repo for independent checkout, build production APK, and run final production regression.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Complete items strictly in numerical order, no skipping
- After each item return: files inspected, files changed, commands run, exit codes, test result, commit status, deployment status, PASS/FAIL
- Do not mark VERIFIED until Android QA checklist completed on physical device
- Do not modify investor, buyer, member, deal, payment, or authentication records unless explicitly required
- Preserve business-data counts before and after
- Only remaining task after closure should be Real Device QA
- Return: GitHub SHA, Render Deploy ID, Production SHA, APK version, Remaining blockers

## Progress
### Done
- **ITEMS 1-8 — ALL PASS**: Deploy auth guard, investors pagination, buyer discovery array fix, Rork SDK removal, video count reconciliation, backend module resolution — all deployed and verified live (commits `32cbb16`, `b622cda`, `318f39bd806130d9`).
- **ITEM 9 — BLOCKED**: All 10 mobile app API endpoints verified live (owner AI, investors 1161, buyer discovery, video feed 8, landing 200, chat 200). Cannot run physical Android device from sandbox.
- **ITEM 10 — PASS**: Final production regression completed — GitHub SHA = Render SHA = `318f39bd806130d9`, health=healthy, readiness=true, AI provider=PROVIDER_READY, rorkDependency=false, deploy route 401 without token, CRM 1161/0 dupes, data safety verified.
- **FINAL CLOSURE Task 1 — Rork SDK removal**: `expo/metro.config.js` plain Expo config (withRorkMetro removed), `expo/package.json` `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` removed. Both were already in HEAD from prior commit.
- **FINAL CLOSURE Task 2 — EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_* removal**: Cleaned `expo/.env` — removed all 4 Rork vars (TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY, AUTH_URL, API_BASE_URL, FUNCTIONS_URL). Also cleaned `android-ivx-holdings/.env`.
- **FINAL CLOSURE Task 3 — Video count reconciliation**: DB has 8 approved videos (Supabase `content-range: 0-7/8`). Fixed `backend/api/ivx-video-platform.ts` (default limit 6→50, added `total_approved_videos` to home feed). Fixed `backend/api/ivx-video-pipeline.ts` (added `approved_count` from DB). Committed in `dd21cfe`.
- **FINAL CLOSURE Task 4 — rork.json removal**: Removed `rork.json` from git tracking, added to `.gitignore`. Committed in `5decd83`. Repo can now be checked out independently.
- **Android .gitignore**: Created `android-ivx-holdings/.gitignore` to prevent `.gradle/` and `app/build/` artifacts from entering repo. Removed existing cached build artifacts.

### In Progress
- **FINAL CLOSURE Task 5 — Build production APK**: Existing APK at `android-ivx-holdings/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` (15.4MB, v1.4.3, versionCode=12). Android project missing Gradle build files (`build.gradle.kts`, `settings.gradle.kts`, `gradlew`, `gradle/wrapper/`) — only source files (`Config.kt`) and build artifacts exist. `runChecks` failed: "Could not extract Android applicationId from app/build.gradle.kts". Need to reconstruct Gradle build files or find alternative build method. `Config.kt` is auto-generated/read-only — must update via `.env` instead.
- **Render deploy**: Triggered via POST `/api/ivx/deploy` (ok=true, deployTriggered=true, status=created). Render still at SHA `318f39bd806130d9` — new deploy of `5decd83` in progress but not yet live after ~3 min of polling.

### Blocked
- **APK build**: Android project missing all Gradle build files — `build.gradle.kts`, `settings.gradle.kts`, `gradlew`, `gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties` all absent. Only `app/src/main/java/com/rork/ivxholdings/Config.kt` and build artifacts exist. Gradle 8.14.1 available at `/home/user/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.1-bin/baw1sv0jfoi8rxs14qo3h49cs/gradle-8.14.1/bin/gradle`. Android SDK at `/opt/android-sdk`.
- **Real Device QA**: No physical Android device available in sandbox — only remaining task after APK build.
- 67 pre-existing backend logic test failures (CRUD lifecycle, pipeline summaries, durable writes, deal tracking) — not module resolution, not related to this work.

## Key Decisions
- `rork.json` removed from git tracking (not just left as workspace config) per FINAL CLOSURE requirement for independent checkout
- Video platform feed default limit changed 6→50 so `count` matches `total` without pagination hiding videos
- Home feed now reports `total_approved_videos` alongside `video_count` (which is featured-only count) for reconciliation transparency
- Video pipeline list now reports `approved_count` from DB alongside its own `count` (processing queue count)
- `Config.kt` in Android project is auto-generated from `.env` — cannot edit directly, must update env vars
- `android-ivx-holdings/.gitignore` created to prevent Gradle build artifacts from polluting repo

## Next Steps
1. Wait for Render deploy to complete — poll `/health` until SHA changes from `318f39bd806130d9` to `5decd838a0b09c0f`
2. Reconstruct Android Gradle build files (`build.gradle.kts`, `settings.gradle.kts`, `gradlew`, wrapper) from build artifacts or create them from scratch based on manifest metadata (applicationId=`com.rork.ivxholdings`, minSdk=24, targetSdk=36, versionCode=12, versionName=1.4.3)
3. Build production APK with cleaned Rork-free code
4. Run complete production regression with new SHA
5. Provide final APK details and closure report

## Critical Context
- **GitHub repo**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- **GitHub HEAD SHA**: `5decd838a0b09c0fd70a8700411196f917ac3c75`
- **Render service ID**: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- **Render current SHA**: `318f39bd806130d9` (deploy of `5decd83` in progress)
- **APK**: v1.4.3, versionCode=12, applicationId=`com.rork.ivxholdings`, 15.4MB at `android-ivx-holdings/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`
- **Supabase URL**: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Owner email**: `owner@ivxholding.com` / `Iperez4242@gmail.com`
- **API base**: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- **Owner token**: `/tmp/owner-token.txt` (1363 chars, needs refresh per session)
- **Video counts**: 8 approved (DB confirmed), 17 total (8 approved + 9 unapproved QA uploads)
- **Gradle binary**: `/home/user/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.1-bin/baw1sv0jfoi8rxs14qo3h49cs/gradle-8.14.1/bin/gradle` (v8.14.1, Kotlin 2.0.21)
- **Android SDK**: `/opt/android-sdk` (has build-tools, cmdline-tools, platform-tools, platforms)
- **Commits this session**: `dd21cfe` (video fixes + .gitignore), `5decd83` (rork.json removal from git)

## Relevant Files
- `backend/api/ivx-video-platform.ts`: Platform feed handler (line 306), home feed handler (line 587) — default limit now 50, home feed reports `total_approved_videos`
- `backend/api/ivx-video-pipeline.ts`: Pipeline list handler (line 125) — now reports `approved_count` from DB via `getApprovedVideoCount()`
- `backend/api/ivx-video-feed.ts`: Video feed handler (line 88) — returns 8 approved videos, no changes needed
- `backend/hono.ts`: Main Hono router, all route registrations (video routes at lines 4877-4897, reels at 5206)
- `expo/metro.config.js`: Plain Expo Metro config (no withRorkMetro)
- `expo/package.json`: Rork SDK removed, version 1.4.3, SDK 54.0.0
- `expo/.env`: Cleaned of all EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_* vars (gitignored, local only)
- `android-ivx-holdings/app/src/main/java/com/rork/ivxholdings/Config.kt`: Auto-generated, read-only — contains Rork var references that need env update
- `android-ivx-holdings/.env`: Cleaned of Rork vars, contains Supabase + toolkit URLs
- `android-ivx-holdings/.gitignore`: New — prevents `.gradle/`, `build/`, `*.apk` from entering repo
- `.gitignore`: Root gitignore — now includes `rork.json`
- `package.json` (root): Backend dependencies including `@supabase/supabase-js@^2.110.2`, `hono@^4.12.12`
